name: composio
description: Use Composio from Codex today and add the connected Composio app for ChatGPT and Codex when its app binding is approved.

interface.longDescription: Discover, connect, and use tools across 1,000+ apps. The package ships authenticated Composio CLI workflows for local Codex and is ready to add the connected Composio app for hosted ChatGPT and Codex after OpenAI assigns its app ID.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
